issue.title: amplifier run crashes on startup with AttributeError: 'NoneType' object has no attribute 'execute'
issue.body:
## Problem

`amplifier run` crashes immediately on startup with:

```
AttributeError: 'NoneType' object has no attribute 'execute'
  File "amplifier_core/session.py", line 142, in _run_loop
    result = await self.orchestrator.execute(prompt)
```

This started after upgrading from 1.4.0 to 1.5.0.

## Steps to reproduce

1. `pip install amplifier==1.5.0`
2. `amplifier run --bundle git+https://github.com/microsoft/amplifier-foundation@main`
3. Observe crash on first user input

## Expected behaviour

Session starts and responds normally.

## Actual behaviour

Crashes immediately. No graceful error message.
